calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2006 Off Calendar

Minor'S Compromise In Scd
Off Calendar Feb-02-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Diana Padilla.
Judith Alex, Esq. for Petitioner: Audrey Porter, present as Guardian at litem for: KH, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $8,750.00
Medical Expenses $78.00
Costs $13,344.00
A net balance of $12,828.00 to be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, 725 Irving Street, San Francisco, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
